overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a Japanese temple garden with vibrant autumn maple trees. The character ascends stone stairs to a wooden bell tower, circles the large bronze bell, and traverses the serene landscape back toward a stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden stream with pagoda view

agents.ego_description: walking along the stream path toward stone stairs with the five-story pagoda visible in the background

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden pagoda with five tiers visible against the sky
vibrant crimson maple trees with dense foliage lining the path
clear flowing water running alongside the stone path
weathered stone steps leading upward into the temple complex
traditional Japanese stone lanterns marking the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a serene temple garden beside a stream, with a majestic five-story pagoda visible in the distance. The character walks along a dirt path lined with vibrant red maple trees, approaching a set of stone stairs that lead deeper into the temple grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending through red maple forest

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs into denser maple tree coverage

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs surrounded by vibrant red maple trees with sun rays filtering through the canopy

entered.detail: low wooden handrail along the right side of the stairs
beams of morning sunlight piercing through the red maple canopy

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs into a narrow corridor of dense red maples. Sun rays filter through the crimson canopy creating a dramatic lighting effect, while the pagoda and stream disappear from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bell tower platform with large bronze bell

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters wooden bell tower structure
moves under the roof into shadow then back into light while circling the bell

agents.ego_description: walking onto the platform and circling around the large bronze bell

entered.detail: traditional wooden temple structure with open sides and tiled roof housing the bell
massive bronze temple bell with verdigris patina suspended in the structure
flat stone tiles forming the floor of the bell tower
thick horizontal wooden beam used to strike the bell

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a stone platform beneath a wooden bell tower. The massive bronze bell dominates the space as the character walks around it, moving between shadow and light cast by the structure's roof.

events.description: exits bell tower back into open garden with stone lanterns

agents.ego_description: traversing the garden path lined with traditional stone lanterns and dense red maples

entered.detail: flat stone paving tiles forming the garden walkway
large boulders covered in green moss flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bell tower, the character returns to the open garden path lined with mossy rocks and traditional stone lanterns. The path winds through dense red maples as the character continues forward through the temple grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream edge with distant traditional buildings

events.description: approaches the stream water at the garden edge

agents.ego_description: walking down toward the stream with traditional temple buildings visible in the distance

entered.detail: clear flowing water at the edge of the stone path
traditional Japanese temple building with tiled roof visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character descends toward the stream, with water visible on the left and a traditional temple building in the distance. The dense maple canopy opens up to reveal the wider landscape as the character approaches the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene temple garden that transitions from an open landscape into a secluded architectural space before returning to the riverside. It begins on a dirt path beside a stream with a distant five-story pagoda, moving toward stone stairs lined with vibrant red maple trees. As the character ascends, the view of the pagoda and stream vanishes, replaced by a narrow corridor where sun rays filter through a dense crimson canopy. The scene then opens onto a stone platform beneath a wooden bell tower, circling a massive bronze bell that casts alternating shadows across the space. Finally, the camera follows the character back through a winding path of mossy rocks and stone lanterns, descending as the maple canopy opens up to reveal the stream and a traditional temple building in the distance.
